sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: BlackSky fourth Gen-3 satellite achieves on-orbit first light operations within hours
feed.summary: BlackSky Technology Inc. has announced that its fourth Gen-3 satellite delivered first light imagery within hours of its launch. This achievement highlights the company's ability to rapidly deploy and commission its 35-centimeter satellites, expanding its capacity for responsive, tactical intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) operations for global customers. All BlackSky Gen-3 satellites have consistently demonstrated on-orbit first light operations on day one, providing high-clarity images for various applications.

feed.title: BBAG ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns BMV:BBAG
feed.summary: The article provides an in-depth analysis of the JPMorgan BetaBuilders U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF (BBAG), detailing its structure, management style, and the index it tracks. It also covers key financial metrics such as assets under management, dividend yield, expense ratio, and breaks down its holdings by asset type and region. The analysis confirms that BBAG invests in bonds, primarily government and securitized sectors, and pays monthly dividends.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of GraniteShares 2x Long BABA Daily ETF (NASDAQ:BABX)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of the GraniteShares 2x Long BABA Daily ETF (NASDAQ:BABX) based on various indicators. It summarizes oscillator and moving average signals, presenting an overall "strong sell" rating for the ETF across different timeframes. The analysis emphasizes that this information is not investment advice and encourages users to consider additional data and their own strategies before making trading decisions.

feed.title: Constellation to Sell 4.4 GW of PJM Gas Power Assets to LS Power for $5B in Regulatory Divestiture
feed.summary: Constellation Energy is selling 4.4 GW of natural gas-fired generation capacity in PJM Interconnection to LS Power Equity Advisors for $5 billion. This divestiture, mandated by the Department of Justice and Federal Energy Regulatory Commission, resolves antitrust concerns following Constellation's acquisition of Calpine Corporation. The deal involves five facilities in Delaware and Pennsylvania, with closing contingent on further regulatory approvals.

feed.title: Mining Stock Eyes Worst Day Since 2024
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NEM) stock is experiencing its worst day since April 2024, down 9.4%, following a drop in gold prices. This decline is attributed to the Federal Reserve signaling only one rate cut in 2026 amid persistent inflation fears and rising oil prices. Options traders are increasingly pessimistic, with a significant surge in put options for NEM.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics schedules April 21 earnings release, 8:30 a.m. call
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics (NYSE: DGX) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 21, 2026, before the market opens, followed by a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET. Investors can access the live webcast and replay details on the company's investor website, and telephone replay will be available until May 5, 2026. The announcement also notes historical stock performance around similar earnings notices and advises investors to review SEC filings for risk factors.

feed.title: New cilantro lime sauce lands at Chipotle for a limited time only
feed.summary: Chipotle is introducing a new cilantro lime sauce to its menu for a limited time, available across the U.S. and Canada starting March 19th. The creamy sauce, made with fresh cilantro, lime, sour cream, Mexican spices, and roasted jalapeños, performed exceptionally well in test markets. Chipotle Rewards members can get a free side or topping of the sauce with a regular-priced entrée purchase on March 19th using the promo code “SOFRESH”.

feed.title: Connect (X) 2026 to Feature AI Network and Edge Leaders from NVIDIA, Nokia, T-Mobile, American Tower, Intel, JLL, Qualcomm
feed.summary: Connect (X) 2026, hosted by the Wireless Infrastructure Association (WIA), will take place May 4-6, 2026, in Fort Lauderdale, Fl. The event will feature keynote discussions with leaders from NVIDIA, Nokia, T-Mobile, American Tower, Intel, JLL, and Qualcomm focusing on AI-RAN, edge computing, and digital infrastructure's role in powering AI. Additional keynotes from AT&T, DigitalBridge, and Verizon, along with a "View from the Tower" session, will address the future of digital infrastructure.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) Stock Falls as $7.5B Chile Mine Expansion Permit Process Begins
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) stock dropped approximately 5% pre-market after the company initiated the environmental permit process for a $7.5 billion expansion of its El Abra copper mine in Chile. This expansion aims to quadruple copper output, adding over 300,000 metric tons annually, though expanded operations are not expected to begin until 2033. The stock decline is also linked to falling copper futures amid concerns about the global economy due to rising energy prices from Middle East conflicts.

feed.title: The Vertical Moat: A Deep Dive into Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS)
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation is highlighted as a global leader in elevators and escalators, uniquely positioned for "defensive growth" despite challenges in the Chinese real estate market. The article emphasizes Otis's successful transition to a high-margin, digital-first service provider, driven by its large installed base and recurring revenue streams. Key to its strategy are digital innovations like Otis ONE and Gen360, which capitalize on urbanisation and an aging equipment base, positioning the company for continued success in a regulatory-moated industry.

feed.title: Resilience Shows Up in Small, Human Ways with Colgate Smiles
feed.summary: Colgate, in partnership with VML, has launched a new campaign titled "Your Smile Is Your Strength." The initiative aims to highlight the connection between a smile and personal resilience, particularly targeting Millennial caregivers who often experience self-doubt. The campaign includes ad spots and mindfulness content developed with Calm to help consumers find moments of reflection and recognize their inner strength.

feed.title: IBM's Price Target Lowered to $290 by BMO Capital on March 19, 2
feed.summary: BMO Capital has lowered its price target for IBM to $290 from $350, while maintaining a 'Market Perform' rating. This adjustment follows several other analyst ratings, which show varied expectations for IBM's future performance. Despite the differing opinions, the average target price from 20 analysts suggests a potential upside of 22.42% from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: Republic Services Rose 5% Year to Date in 2026. Here’s Where the Stock Could Go Next
feed.summary: Republic Services (RSG) stock has risen 5% year-to-date in 2026, driven by its defensive, cash-generating business model and strong pricing power. The company delivered robust 2025 financial results and provided steady guidance for 2026, reinforcing investor confidence despite mixed analyst sentiment and some institutional stake trimming. TIKR's valuation model suggests the stock is currently fairly valued to slightly undervalued, with future performance expected to be driven by pricing, margin expansion, and consistent free cash flow rather than rapid revenue growth.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Highlights the Resilience of Delta Air Lines Despite Surging Oil Prices
feed.summary: Jim Cramer recently highlighted the unexpected resilience of Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) even as oil prices were surging to $95 a barrel. Cramer noted that despite the potential negative impact of high oil prices on airlines, Delta is reporting strong numbers for both regular and business travel. He contrasted Wall Street's negative outlook with the reality of Delta's performance, suggesting that in this instance, the real-world positive results outweighed the negative market sentiment.

feed.title: CME Group (CME) general counsel sells 3,291 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Jonathan L. Marcus, Senior Managing Director and General Counsel of CME Group Inc. (CME), sold 3,291 shares of Class A common stock at $333.37 per share. This transaction was carried out under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on February 18, 2025. Following the sale, Marcus directly holds 7,192 shares of CME Group.

feed.title: Baird Raises Price Target for Jabil (JBL) to $281, Maintains Out
feed.summary: Baird analyst Luke Junk has raised the price target for Jabil Inc. (JBL) to $281 from $275, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating, indicating a positive outlook. This decision follows similar upward revisions from other analysts like Barclays and JP Morgan. Jabil provides engineering, manufacturing, and supply chain solutions across various industries, and Wall Street analysts currently forecast an average target price of $278.64, suggesting a 7.72% upside from its current price.

feed.title: Alibaba stock is falling as it spends heavily on AI. CEO Eddie Wu insists the tech will be its main growth driver
feed.summary: Alibaba's net income significantly declined by 66% year-over-year in Q4 2025, falling short of revenue expectations despite a 2% increase, due to heavy investments in AI. CEO Eddie Wu remains confident that AI will be the company's primary growth driver, even as U.S.-listed shares saw a premarket drop. The company's Cloud Intelligence Group showed a 36% rise in revenue, leading the overall modest growth.

feed.title: Equifax Canada Partners with Breachlink to Launch ReadyResponse Service for Enhanced Cybersecurity Preparedness for SMBs
feed.summary: Equifax Canada has partnered with Breachlink to introduce ReadyResponse, a new service designed to bolster cybersecurity preparedness for small and mid-sized businesses (SMBs). This service provides essential resources, legal expertise, and a network of professionals to help SMBs prepare for, respond to, and recover from cybersecurity incidents. The initiative aims to address the growing number of cyber incidents targeting SMBs that often lack the necessary support.

feed.title: Arm Holdings (ARM) jumps 5.7% as revenues break records
feed.summary: This article states that Arm Holdings (ARM) experienced a 5.7% increase in its stock value, driven by record-breaking revenues. However, the article provides no further details on the specific financial figures, the duration of the record-breaking period, or the factors contributing to this growth.

feed.title: Colgate aims for stressed millennials with campaign about resilience
feed.summary: Colgate has launched a new campaign, "Your Smile Is Your Strength," targeting stressed millennials with a message of resilience and self-confidence. The campaign, which includes partnerships with over 30 content creators and mental health app Calm, spans various media platforms like linear TV, YouTube, Disney CTV, and social media. This initiative is based on research indicating a significant percentage of people, especially millennials, struggle to recognize their inner strength, and aims to connect smiles with personal resilience.

feed.title: Honeywell and Boeing Seek Improved Flight Contrail Assessments
feed.summary: Honeywell and Boeing, alongside other companies like Thales, are collaborating to better understand and mitigate contrail formation from aircraft. Their goal is to integrate more effective sensors onto planes to accurately measure contrails, thereby reducing aviation's impact on climate change. This initiative highlights the industry's focus on sustainable aviation practices.

feed.title: John Deere’s archives are powering its modern-day marketing
feed.summary: John Deere leverages its extensive archives for modern marketing and PR strategies, transforming historical assets into engaging content for social media and campaigns. Neil Dahlstrom, the branded properties and heritage manager, plays a crucial role in curating and providing historical images and stories, ensuring accuracy while contributing to the company's forward-looking narrative. The article emphasizes that company archives can be a valuable content engine, offering tips for other organizations to utilize their historical materials effectively.

feed.title: Olive Garden bosses reveal 70 new restaurants coming in 2026
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants Inc., parent company of Olive Garden and other brands, announced plans to open 70 new restaurants across its portfolio in fiscal year 2026, an increase from their initial goal of 60-65. The company shared this update during an earnings call, attributing the growth to strong sales, with Olive Garden and LongHorn Steakhouse leading performance. Darden also projects opening 75 to 80 new restaurants in fiscal year 2027 and will convert 14 Bahama Breeze locations into other Darden-owned brands.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum stock hits all-time high at 238.82 USD
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) stock reached an all-time high of $238.82, achieving a 61% total return over the past year and 46% year-to-date gains, supported by strong investor confidence and favorable market conditions. InvestingPro analysis indicates the stock is trading near its Fair Value with a PEG ratio of 0.55, suggesting attractive growth prospects. This surge follows the company's impressive Q4 2025 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations, leading to several analysts raising their price targets.

feed.title: Lkq stock hits 52-week low at $28.08 amid challenging year
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation's stock has reached a 52-week low of $27.92, reflecting a 28.5% decline over the past year due to challenges in the automotive parts sector. Despite downward earnings revisions from analysts, the company remains profitable and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro. This comes after LKQ reported slight EPS misses but exceeded revenue forecasts in its Q4 2025 earnings and announced a director's departure.

feed.title: Jabil Analysts Increase Their Forecasts After Better-Than-Expected Q2 Results
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) reported stronger-than-expected fiscal second-quarter 2026 results and raised its full-year outlook, leading analysts to increase their forecasts. The company's adjusted EPS and net revenue surpassed consensus estimates, and it projects robust figures for Q3 and the full fiscal year, driven by advanced technologies like AI. Following these positive results, several analysts maintained their Buy or Outperform ratings and raised their price targets for Jabil.

feed.title: Hershey combines salty, sweets units to accelerate growth
feed.summary: Hershey is integrating its sweet, salty, and protein brands under a single umbrella to enhance consumer connections, strengthen partnerships, and accelerate leadership in snacking. This restructuring, dubbed "One Hershey," aims to simplify operations and leverage the strengths of each segment, especially important in a climate of higher cocoa costs and fluctuating consumer spending. As part of the changes, Andrew Archambault will now oversee the full U.S. portfolio, while Vero Villasenor becomes Chief Brand Officer and Stacy Taffet expands her role to include marketing.

feed.title: Is Conagra Brands Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
feed.summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) stock has significantly underperformed the Nasdaq Composite ($NASX) over the past three months and the last 52 weeks, with declines of 12.6% and 40.2%, respectively. The company's recent Q2 2026 earnings showed a drop in net sales, and its stock was further impacted by a bearish outlook from a peer, Campbell’s Company (CPB). Analysts currently rate CAG as a "Hold" with a modest upside potential of 21.3%.

feed.title: Record Q4 for Biofrontera (NASDAQ: BFRI) with 36% revenue growth
feed.summary: Biofrontera (NASDAQ: BFRI) announced record fourth-quarter 2025 results, with a 36% revenue increase to $17.1 million and a swing to profitability, reporting $5.6 million in net income. The company also improved its gross margin to 82.4% and significantly reduced its earnout rate on U.S. net sales after acquiring Ameluz and RhodoLED assets. Despite a profitable Q4, Biofrontera reported a full-year net loss of $10.5 million, though this was a substantial improvement from the prior year.

feed.title: Edison CEO’s Pay Rose 20% After Eaton Fire; Pasadena Legislator Vows Action
feed.summary: Edison International's CEO, Pedro Pizarro, received a 20% pay raise in 2025 following a surge in the company's net income, despite the devastating Eaton Fire, which is likely attributed to Edison's equipment. Assemblymember John Harabedian of Pasadena is advocating for legislative action, pushing for executive compensation to be tied to safety metrics and for fire survivors and ratepayers not to bear the financial burden while executives profit. A state report on the California Wildfire Fund, due April 1, is expected to recommend new approaches for allocating wildfire damage costs, which Harabedian hopes will lead to reforms.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin selects Fortem Technologies to deploy autonomous counter-drone systems for critical infrastructure protection
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin has contracted Fortem Technologies to deploy autonomous counter-drone systems to protect critical infrastructure. Fortem will provide its TrueView radar sensors and DroneHunter autonomous interceptors, which will be integrated with Lockheed Martin’s Sanctum software to create a layered airspace defense. This agreement underscores the increasing demand for advanced airspace security and Fortem's growing role in both civilian and military counter-drone applications, following recent contracts with the Department of Homeland Security and the U.S. Army.

feed.title: Facing a Nasdaq delisting hearing, American Rebel goes 1-for-100
feed.summary: American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB) announced a 1-for-100 reverse stock split of its common stock and publicly traded warrants, effective March 23, 2026. This move is primarily aimed at regaining compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share ahead of a scheduled delisting hearing on March 24, 2026. The company also implemented round lot stockholder protection to ensure existing holders of 100 or more shares retain at least 100 post-split shares, with fractional shares rounded up.

feed.title: Campbell’s brings iconic soup name to sauces
feed.summary: Campbell's is launching a new line of sauces in June, leveraging its iconic soup brand to appeal to consumers who already use its soups as cooking ingredients. These new canned sauces will come in five flavors, including butter chicken and Thai curry, and will be placed in the soup aisle to encourage at-home cooking, a trend that escalated during the pandemic. This move capitalizes on existing consumer behavior and global flavor trends, following a similar push by Nestlé USA into the condiment market.

feed.title: AstraZeneca to boost cell therapy capabilities with new China investment
feed.summary: AstraZeneca is expanding its cell therapy capabilities and presence in China by building a new manufacturing and supply facility in Shanghai. This facility will enable end-to-end cell therapy production for CAR-T therapies in China and other Asian markets, including those for multiple myeloma and autoimmune diseases obtained through the acquisition of Gracell Biotechnologies. The investment follows AstraZeneca's $15 billion pledge to China's biotech ecosystem and underscores its strategic push into cell therapy and the Chinese market.

feed.title: This Xponential Fitness Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 3 Downgrades For Thursday
feed.summary: Benzinga reports on three significant analyst downgrades for Thursday. Raymond James downgraded Xponential Fitness (NYSE: XPOF) from "Strong Buy" to "Market Perform" after its shares closed at $5.67. Additionally, Evercore ISI Group downgraded CSX Corp (NASDAQ: CSX) from "Outperform" to "In-Line" with a raised price target, and DA Davidson downgraded Life360 (NASDAQ: LIF) from "Buy" to "Neutral" with a lowered price target.

feed.title: Biofrontera turns Q4 profitable after cutting Ameluz earnout payments
feed.summary: Biofrontera Inc. reported record Q4 2025 revenue of $17.1 million, a 36% increase year-over-year, leading to a net income of $5.6 million and turning the quarter profitable. The company's gross margin significantly improved to 82.4% due to a reduced earnout structure for its U.S. Ameluz and RhodoLED assets. Biofrontera also announced key clinical and regulatory milestones, including FDA filing acceptance for an sNDA with a PDUFA date in September 2026, and positive trial results for acne and actinic keratoses.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley reiterates Nucor stock rating on Q1 guidance By Investing.com
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated an Equalweight rating on Nucor (NYSE:NUE) stock with a $180.00 price target. The company is expected to outperform peers, fueled by better-than-expected Q1 2026 guidance, with anticipated earnings increases across all three segments, particularly in steel mills due to higher selling prices and volumes. Nucor has also maintained dividend payments for 54 consecutive years, highlighting its commitment to shareholder returns.

feed.title: MSCI Inc. Stock (ISIN: US55354G1004) Hits New Highs Amid AI Boom and Index Demand Surge
feed.summary: MSCI Inc. (ISIN: US55354G1004) has reached multi-year highs in early 2026, driven by strong demand for its benchmark indexes and analytics tools, particularly with the rise of AI-driven investing and sustainability mandates. The company benefits from a high-margin recurring revenue model, strong analyst ratings, and appeals to European investors seeking exposure to U.S. financial data leaders. Despite a premium valuation, its strategic position in AI and ESG data, combined with capital returns, supports continued growth.

feed.title: How Invesco’s New Equal-Weight Nasdaq-100 ETF Could Reframe the QQQ Story for IVZ Investors
feed.summary: Invesco recently launched the Invesco QQQ Equal Weight ETF (QEW), which tracks the Nasdaq-100 Equal Weighted Index, rebalancing quarterly. This ETF aims to reduce concentration risk and broaden exposure beyond mega-cap names within the Nasdaq-100. The launch, alongside an increased equity buyback authorization, is part of Invesco's strategy to balance product innovation with capital returns, supporting per-share metrics amidst earnings volatility and margin pressure from low-cost products.

feed.title: BTIG Analyst Raises Price Target for Arvinas (ARVN) to $16 | ARV
feed.summary: BTIG analyst Jeet Mukherjee has reaffirmed a 'Buy' rating for Arvinas (ARVN) and increased the price target from $14.00 to $16.00, indicating a positive outlook for the company. This follows several other analysts who have recently raised their price targets for Arvinas, a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing therapies that degrade disease-causing proteins. Wall Street analysts project an average target price of $15.24 for ARVN, suggesting a potential upside of 39.90% from its current price.

feed.title: Align Technology Shares Jump Following Report Of Large Elliott Position
feed.summary: Align Technology (NASDAQ: ALGN) shares jumped after a report indicated activist investor Elliott Investment Management has taken a significant stake in the company. Elliott is expected to push for strategic changes to boost shareholder value, as Align grapples with slowing demand following its pandemic-era peak. Despite recent struggles, the company reported record volume in Q4 2025 for its Invisalign business, and several analysts have upgraded its stock or raised price targets.

feed.title: AeroVironment Expands Manufacturing Capacity, UAS Products, With ESAero Acquisition
feed.summary: AeroVironment has acquired Empirical Systems Aerospace, Inc. (ESAero) for $200 million, a move designed to boost its manufacturing capabilities, UAS product offerings, and expertise in electric and hybrid propulsion. The acquisition adds ESAero's facilities in San Luis Obispo, California, including manufacturing, design, and prototyping sites, along with its 300 employees and leadership team. This deal enhances AeroVironment's capacity for rapid prototyping and production, particularly in advanced defense technologies and counter-UAS systems.

feed.title: This Rocket Lab Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Thursday
feed.summary: Clear Street initiated coverage on Rocket Lab Corp (NASDAQ: RKLB) with a Buy rating and an $88 price target. Other analysts also started coverage on several companies, including Inventiva, FrontView REIT Inc, Okta Inc, and Dianthus Therapeutics Inc, all with bullish ratings and price targets. This article summarizes these top five analyst initiations.

feed.title: K-Beauty World Expands Assortment on Ulta Beauty Marketplace With 17 Viral Korean Beauty Brands
feed.summary: K-Beauty World, in partnership with Ulta Beauty, is expanding its presence on Ulta Beauty Marketplace by adding 17 popular Korean beauty brands. This expansion allows U.S. consumers faster access to new K-beauty innovations, with products debuting in as little as nine weeks compared to traditional retail's nine-month timeframe. The platform acts as a launchpad for Korean brands to enter the U.S. market and potentially expand into Ulta Beauty stores, demonstrated by Dr. Melaxin's success.

feed.title: Deere, Toro, and Titan Machinery see mixed dealer sales in February says DA Davidson
feed.summary: DA Davidson reports mixed dealer sales for agricultural and outdoor power equipment in February. Agricultural equipment sales fell 11% year-over-year for the fifth consecutive month, impacting companies like Deere & Company, CNH Industrial, and Titan Machinery. Conversely, outdoor power equipment sales, benefiting The Toro Company, rose 6% year-over-year, marking three months of growth. DA Davidson maintains a positive outlook on these companies despite the divergent trends.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (AEBI) Aebi Schmidt Group Reports Q4 Revenue $528.4M, vs. FactSet Est of $528.0M
feed.summary: Aebi Schmidt Group announced its Q4 revenue reached $528.4 million, slightly exceeding FactSet's estimate of $528.0 million. This financial update indicates a positive performance for the company in the last quarter of the year. The report highlights the group's revenue generation in line with or slightly above analyst expectations.

feed.title: AACG Forecast — Price Prediction for 2026. Should I Buy AACG?
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed price prediction for ATA Creativity Global (AACG) stock, leveraging AI analysis, technical signals, moving average trends, short sell data, and seasonality. It concludes with a "Strong Buy" recommendation for AACG in the short to mid-term, while also forecasting monthly price ranges and potential ROIs for 2026. The analysis also includes projections for 2030 and discusses the stock's historical performance and various technical indicators.

feed.title: 5 Key Companies Hiring Scientific Sales Reps
feed.summary: This article identifies five major companies actively seeking scientific sales representatives, highlighting the valuable skill set of medical and clinical professionals for this role. It details Danaher Corporation, STEMCELL Technologies, Boston Scientific, Johnson & Johnson, and Natera, outlining their key sales areas, company culture, and types of opportunities available. The piece emphasizes that a clinical background is a significant asset for success in scientific sales, framing the role as more consultative than traditional sales.

feed.title: Zumiez Inc. (NASDAQ:ZUMZ) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Zumiez Inc. reported strong Q4 2025 results, exceeding earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.13 against an expected $1.08. The company highlighted robust full-price selling in North America and significant gross margin expansion, alongside strategic improvements in its European business despite sales declines. For fiscal 2026, Zumiez anticipates low single-digit total sales growth and continued operating margin expansion, driven by ongoing strategic initiatives focused on product newness, private label growth, and profitability optimization.

feed.title: Mirova Increases Stake in Emerson Electric
feed.summary: Mirova, an asset management firm, has increased its stake in Emerson Electric Co. by 20.3% during the third quarter of 2026, bringing its total holdings to 71,051 shares valued at $9.32 million. This move suggests Mirova sees significant long-term value and growth potential in the industrial conglomerate despite economic challenges, attracting interest from other institutional investors as well.
